title: Contribute corrected transcriptions back to By the People
output: A dataset of corrected transcriptions submitted to By the People, plus a contribution-pathway document.
acceptanceCriteria: A program agreement or contribution pathway with By the People / Concordia is confirmed before any data is submitted.
Only transcriptions derived from cleared items with complete provenance are submitted.
The submission aligns with and does not duplicate existing By the People work on the same items.
Attribution and provenance are carried through the contribution.
The contribution pathway and outcome are documented.
context: LoC's By the People (Concordia) crowd-transcription program accepts volunteer contributions of corrected transcriptions. The engine's cleared corpus overlaps with Concordia source material; contributing back aligns the projects and benefits the LoC community without duplicating or competing with By the People. Requires a program agreement. Unscheduled backlog; needs By the People program agreement first.
objective: Identify corrected transcriptions derived from the cleared corpus eligible for contribution to By the People (Concordia), confirm program agreement and contribution format requirements, and submit a first batch via the approved contribution pathway.
